use_cases: Hierarchical navigation menus with drill-down capability for multi-level options
Action menus requiring visual feedback with ripple effects on selection
Settings or configuration panels with categorized option lists
Accessible navigation systems leveraging Radix UI primitives
ai_summary: A sophisticated dropdown menu component built on Radix UI primitives featuring drill-down navigation with back history, dual-physics ripple animations, and smooth menu transitions. Supports hierarchical nested menus with configurable border radius and provides both click-reveal and keyboard accessibility. Designed as a flexible, reusable navigation system suitable for web applications requiring intuitive multi-level menu interactions.
